generation_config.prompt_used: Recreate this street scene as a polished, realistic daytime image while preserving the four visible cars, road, buildings, lawn, and clear weather. Keep composition and subject identity consistent while producing a clean high-quality visual variation. Preserve the original composition, subject identity, spatial layout, and important objects. Visual anchors: A balanced landscape image dominated by blue, neutral gray, green tones with sky, cars, road. Local fallback approximation: The scene appears outdoors with a bright upper sky region, darker road/foreground, colored vehicle-like regions, and blocky background structures. Key visible elements: sky, cars, road, buildings. Avoid distorted text, watermarks, and artifacts.
generation_config.negative_prompt: watermark, text artifacts, distorted anatomy, blurry, low quality
